title: India Ratings Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: India Ratings Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, India Ratings Ventures Solutions in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About India Ratings Ventures Solutions:
India Ratings Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings Ventures Solutions!
